REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (345,347,349 San Carlos, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for (executor) Luis Morales. Mike Dierke specially appearing for Ernest Der for (co-owner) Jose Cruz who is present in court.

The Court confirmed that Mr. Cruz was present and that there were no objections.
The sale for 100% interest of the property,50% interest to the estate was confirmed at $1,465,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 12/24/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lee. (Not Reported)
